title: NSN Interfaces and Capabilities
chapter_title: Ground Data Systems and Mission Operations

data.Direct to Earth: Tone Ranging 1-way or 2-way Doppler Antenna Angle Data
data.Space Relay: Spread Spectrum Ranging 1-way or 2-way Doppler Antenna Angle Data

data.Direct to Earth: Range: S-band: < 5 meters, 1σ Doppler (Range-Rate): S-band 1-way: ≤ 30 mm/s, 1σ S-band 2-way: ≤ 15 mm/s, 1σ X-band 1-way: ≤ 7 mm/s, 1σ Ka-band 1-way: ≤ 2 mm/s, 1σ Antenna Angles: S: 0.03°, X: 0.05° Ka: 0.01° (auto), 0.05° (program)
data.Space Relay: Range: ≤ 2.73 meters, 1σ Doppler (Range-Rate): 1-way ≤ 1.55 mm/s, 1σ 2-way ≤ 3.1 mm/s, 1σ Antenna Angles: ≤ 0.1°

data.Direct to Earth: C-band (5.4-5.9 GHz) Single Object X-Band (10.499 GHz) Multi Object

data.Space Relay: User Spacecraft Clock Calibration System: ≤ ±5 μs Return Channel Time Delay: ±25% of a bit period
